records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Golden Tree. I beg that you allow our children a safe passageway to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Golden Tree. I beg that you allow our children a safe passageway to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Golden Tree. I beg that you allow our children a safe passageway to the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that they can break free from the shackles of the Apocalypse Augury and start anew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that they can break free from the shackles of the Apocalypse Augury and start anew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that they can break free from the shackles of the Apocalypse Augury and start anew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop knocking on the door, Morgana. What if you break the transmission device?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop knocking on the door, Morgana. What if you break the transmission device?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop knocking on the door, Morgana. What if you break the transmission device?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You go ahead to the Promised Land. The adults and I will defend the Stump.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You go ahead to the Promised Land. The adults and I will defend the Stump.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You go ahead to the Promised Land. The adults and I will defend the Stump.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open it, Karolis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open it, Karolis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open it, Karolis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can a weak kid like you possibly defend the Stump?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can a weak kid like you possibly defend the Stump?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can a weak kid like you possibly defend the Stump?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! I'm stronger than you right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! I'm stronger than you right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! I'm stronger than you right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... worked so hard, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... worked so hard, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... worked so hard, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: why do I have to be here... at the most important moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: why do I have to be here... at the most important moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: why do I have to be here... at the most important moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be honest, I'm relieved that you're one of the people going to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be honest, I'm relieved that you're one of the people going to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be honest, I'm relieved that you're one of the people going to the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you worked the hardest in the Stump.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you worked the hardest in the Stump.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you worked the hardest in the Stump.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're relieved...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're relieved...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're relieved...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So abandoning everything I protected and running away... is what I get for what I've done?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So abandoning everything I protected and running away... is what I get for what I've done?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So abandoning everything I protected and running away... is what I get for what I've done?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing left!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing left!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing left!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I could, I want everyone to live peacefully here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I could, I want everyone to live peacefully here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I could, I want everyone to live peacefully here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we have to leave, I want everyone to leave together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we have to leave, I want everyone to leave together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we have to leave, I want everyone to leave together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we must <color=#ffd34c>choose</color>! And we chose what we thought was best!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we must <color=#ffd34c>choose</color>! And we chose what we thought was best!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we must <color=#ffd34c>choose</color>! And we chose what we thought was best!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We do not believe in prophecies to conform to a predetermined outcome, cutie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We do not believe in prophecies to conform to a predetermined outcome, cutie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We do not believe in prophecies to conform to a predetermined outcome, cutie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we cannot change the future, would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we cannot change the future, would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we cannot change the future, would it not be best for you to make decisions resulting in the fewest regrets?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey... I'm sorry for yelling at you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey... I'm sorry for yelling at you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey... I'm sorry for yelling at you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came here to say goodbye... and all I did was say something stupid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came here to say goodbye... and all I did was say something stupid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came here to say goodbye... and all I did was say something stupid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is Lugh right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is Lugh right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is Lugh right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, well... I saw her riding Dylan and heading east.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, well... I saw her riding Dylan and heading east.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, well... I saw her riding Dylan and heading east.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the barrier safely activated, maybe she went to help the High Priest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the barrier safely activated, maybe she went to help the High Priest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the barrier safely activated, maybe she went to help the High Priest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... don't mention it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... don't mention it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... don't mention it.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But why do you ask
8g?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But why do you ask
8g?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But why do you ask
8g?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that? Did the monster get to Avalon's Gate already?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that? Did the monster get to Avalon's Gate already?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that? Did the monster get to Avalon's Gate already?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's quiet for now... so I think unlikely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's quiet for now... so I think unlikely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's quiet for now... so I think unlikely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Except for Miss Morgana's capsule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Except for Miss Morgana's capsule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Except for Miss Morgana's capsule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Miss Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll get hurt if you keep hitting it, so I beg you to stop...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll get hurt if you keep hitting it, so I beg you to stop...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll get hurt if you keep hitting it, so I beg you to stop...

records.m_Talk_ENG: LET ME OUT OF HERE!
records.m_Talk_DEU: LET ME OUT OF HERE!
records.m_Talk_FRA: LET ME OUT OF HERE!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that voice... Karolis'?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that voice... Karolis'?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that voice... Karolis'?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you in there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you in there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you in there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana shoved me in here and ran!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana shoved me in here and ran!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana shoved me in here and ran!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lock's broken. If we force it open, the transmission device might malfunction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lock's broken. If we force it open, the transmission device might malfunction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lock's broken. If we force it open, the transmission device might malfunction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis, did you do this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis, did you do this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis, did you do this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can I? Morgana ripped it out by herself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can I? Morgana ripped it out by herself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can I? Morgana ripped it out by herself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Morgana... ripped it out herself...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Morgana... ripped it out herself...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Morgana... ripped it out herself...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has her Helgon powers returned?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has her Helgon powers returned?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has her Helgon powers returned?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a life support device on the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a life support device on the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a life support device on the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assume... it's Miss Morgana's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assume... it's Miss Morgana's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assume... it's Miss Morgana's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: How strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There has never been a Helgon who could go head-to-head with my sister before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There has never been a Helgon who could go head-to-head with my sister before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There has never been a Helgon who could go head-to-head with my sister before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This child is no ordinary Helgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This child is no ordinary Helgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This child is no ordinary Helgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does she not seem familiar? I heard that natural enemies could recognize each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does she not seem familiar? I heard that natural enemies could recognize each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does she not seem familiar? I heard that natural enemies could recognize each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Antagonist...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Antagonist...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Antagonist...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The desperateness of humanity and the will of the Golden Tree...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The desperateness of humanity and the will of the Golden Tree...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The desperateness of humanity and the will of the Golden Tree...

records.m_Talk_ENG: has chosen her as the last hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: has chosen her as the last hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: has chosen her as the last hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sola!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sola!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sola!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree's root...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree's root...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree's root...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you think I would just stand by and watch since I could not use my limbs?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you think I would just stand by and watch since I could not use my limbs?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you think I would just stand by and watch since I could not use my limbs?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sorry, but you cannot help your Apostle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sorry, but you cannot help your Apostle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sorry, but you cannot help your Apostle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... damned devil...
